summary: Comprehensive testing of Phase 1 features: Product/Service Catalogue, Business Documents wizard, Tax Calculator auto-fill, and Menu restructure. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend components render correctly with proper functionality.
features_tested: POST /api/catalogue/upload - Upload CSV file for validation ✓
GET /api/finance/tax-autofill - Get auto-fill data from invoices ✓
Frontend: Menu shows new structure (Catalogue, Documents in sidebar) ✓
Frontend: AI Website Builder has Analytics and Domains tabs ✓
Frontend: Tax Calculator has Auto-Fill button ✓

catalogue_crud.description: Full CRUD operations for catalogue items including search and filter

catalogue_upload.description: CSV file upload and validation with missing price handling

catalogue_bulk.description: Bulk add validated items to catalogue

documents_api.description: Document generation, save, retrieve, and filter operations

tax_autofill.description: Tax auto-fill data from invoices with year parameter

menu_structure.description: Verify new menu endpoints exist (catalogue, documents, analytics, domains)

seed_data_creation: Created test catalogue items and documents during testing. Cleanup performed to remove TEST_ prefixed items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested: 1) Product/Service Catalogue with CRUD, CSV upload, validation, and bulk add. 2) Business Documents wizard with 5 document types (Terms, Privacy, Service Agreement, Proposal, NDA) using AI generation with fallback templates. 3) Tax Calculator auto-fill from invoices. 4) Menu restructured - Analytics and Domains moved under AI Website Builder tabs, A/B Testing and Automation removed from menu. All 27 backend tests pass. Previous iterations covered WebSocket notifications, Custom Domains, Team Collaboration, and AI Website Builder features.
